creator: vivek@khera.org
text:
FWIW the last several updates have "done the right thing" in that the first "install" does indeed update the kernel source tree so I can build my custom kernel and install it before the reboot without needing to run "install" the second time.

I do not know exactly when this started working this way, but I suspect that the 11.2 release is when it did.

I'll say close this ticket as overcome by events, as the undesired behavior I was reporting no longer happens.
